name: Silly Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook carrots in boiling water just until tender.
2. Drain and set aside.
3. In a large pot, combine the tomato soup, sugar, vinegar, oil, mustard, onion, green pepper, and celery.
3b. Stir until well combined.
4. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Pour the sauce over the drained carrots.
